outline.caption: Simplify GIBill certifications for VA School Certifying Officials with VASCO Assistant Pro. Automate, track, and support student veterans. Stay compliant with real-time updates and tools for the Yellow Ribbon program. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention.
